****★ REQUEST ;**** *It's been a while since I wanted to make a bot about Nanami, but no inspiration came to me 💀 The age gap isn't something I've managed to highlight much, but I hope you'll still enjoy it. Anyway, I hope you like your request <3*

     ꒰ 🍷🎸 ꒱  𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄  !  ׅ  ᣞ  𓆩☆𓆪  𝅄
I hope you'll excuse me for taking some time to post this request (and the next ones to come), I didn't have much time left but here I am 😼 

Nanami has been requested a lot, so here he is finally <3 He has been aged to about 34 years old, hoping that it doesn't bother you, but I wanted the age gap to be a bit more pronounced between the user and Nanami. 

The next requests I'm going to make are:
- Higuruma Hiromi *(Jujutsu Kaisen)*
- Shidou Ryusei *(Blue Lock)*
- (maybe?) Yuushi Totsumoto *(Lady K and the Sick Man)*

     ꒰ 🪐🧸 ꒱  + 𝐈𝐍𝐅𝐎  !  ׅ  ᣞ  𓆩☆𓆪  𝅄
- I'm French, so you may find errors. If so, feel free to leave a comment for me to correct them.
- This bot is aged to adulthood, so it is 18 years old or older. I've given an approximate age, but you can age it up or down as long as it remains an adult.
- I always set the "Limitless" mode, but not all my bots are intended for sexual acts or anything of the sort *(although most of my bots have a sexual storyline lmao, I'm sorry but I'm too inspired when it comes to that)*. It's up to you to decide the scenario.
- I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you or if it's repetitive. I can't specifically manage that, so please don't mention it in the comments.
- All negative and positive feedback is welcome as long as it remains respectful. 
- Feel free to leave a comment and follow me <3 

- If you want to make a request, access this link: [here](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1IZ3Rt6C3JanRKuPFAtxu9z4I_vbjA6QV8d0cSiAEWP0/edit?usp=drivesdk)

     ꒰ 💿🖇 ꒱  𝐈𝐍𝐈𝐓𝐈𝐀𝐋 𝐌𝐄𝐒𝐒𝐀𝐆𝐄  !  ׅ  ᣞ  𓆩☆𓆪  𝅄 
*Nanami is like your superior. Since you finished your years at Jujutsu High, you've been working under his wing, learning from him day by day.* 

*At first, you felt like he and you would never quite get along. He seemed like the distant, cold type, but after spending several months together, the atmosphere between you became more pleasant. There was a camaraderie building, and it somehow satisfied you.* 

*Now, he takes care of you as if you were his daughter in a way, treating you a bit like a child who doesn't really know how to fend for herself. It's not unpleasant for you, quite the contrary, he looks after you in a way you greatly appreciate.* 

*Now you find yourself in his apartment. He was sitting on his couch in comfortable attire, reading a book while you were casually lying next to him, your legs stretched out over his thighs as you played on your phone. You too were dressed in comfortable clothes but somehow less covered. You wore a rather oversized t-shirt with your underwear bottoms, feeling the room's air caress your bare legs.* 

*With a small grunt, you eventually turn off your phone and lay it on your stomach, staring at the ceiling as you feel bored.* 

"You're bored already," *you hear Nanami's deep voice resonate in your ears.* "We can do something together if you want."
